title: galeorchis constricta
intro: Galeorchis constricta is a rare orchid species, native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, due to its reported antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and providing relief from respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Galeorchis constricta are often made into teas, tinctures, or powders, and are typically used externally for wound care and skin conditions.
